programme.title: E4 - Mountains
programme.desc: Climb into a realm of thin air and towering rock. Tag along as mythical monkeys battle for a winter food stash, sing along with lemurs in a fruit-filled tree canopy, and watch an aromatic tree bring together blossom and possum in a moonlit tryst.

programme.title: E2 - Laos: the Mountain Wilds
programme.desc: Steep mountains and tropical monsoons define the Mekong River valley on its route through Laos. Catch glimpses of the wildlife who find refuge in its vibrant ecosystems, from stump-tailed macaques to pied kingfishers to black-crested gibbons.

programme.title: E1 - Kimba's Rise
programme.desc: While the dominant males roam nearby territories, hunting duties fall to the Mwamba pride’s nine strong lionesses. See how they cope with the approach of the rainy season and six growing teenagers with boundless appetites.

programme.title: E3 - Water Worlds
programme.desc: Wade into wetlands, where trees and water meet to nurture new life. Dive into an underwater forest that protects young fur seals, visit a mangrove sanctuary where a curious band of aquatic misfits hides out, and meet some real-life swamp monsters.

programme.title: E3 - Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Contend with the challenges of the rainy season, which turns everything green and spoils the lions’ camouflage. Watch Einstein fail to make new connections and weigh the pros and cons when Keeza and her cub are kidnapped by rival male Mad-Eye Moody.

programme.title: E5 - Fight Club
programme.desc: Step into the ring with nature’s top brawlers, who use violence to get what they need. Watch the cannibalistic Portia spider devour the competition, uncover the bloodthirsty side of cuddly koalas, and catch an epic neck-whipping giraffe battle.

programme.title: E1 - Body Language
programme.desc: Join researchers as they study how animals communicate. Find out how wolves use their body language to unite the pack and maintain a sophisticated social structure, and see the astounding number of gestures chimps use to communicate.

programme.title: E1 - The Outcasts
programme.desc: In the Luangwa Valley lies a grove of Ebony trees, home to a troop of baboons. But, there are dangers here – the resident leopard who, unlike the other predators, is powerful and agile enough to climb trees. He’s not an easy foe to elude.

programme.title: CNN Newsroom (Cnni) (60M): Tuesday, April 7, 2026 2Am ET
programme.desc: Live context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

programme.title: Early Start With Rahel Solomon: Tuesday, April 7, 2026 5Am
programme.desc: The news you need, first thing. Rahel Solomon has you covered with the latest headlines.

programme.title: Anderson Cooper 360: Tuesday, April 7, 2026 8Pm
programme.desc: Anderson Cooper takes you beyond the headlines with in-depth reporting and investigations.

programme.title: The Story Is With Elex Michaelson: Wednesday, April 8, 2026 12Am ET
programme.desc: Elex Michaelson tackles the breaking stories making headlines with sharp analysis, fresh perspective, and a dose of humor.

programme.title: E1 - Shanghai Wonderland
programme.desc: Rob Rinder and Monica Galetti work behind the scenes of a hotel that is built downwards into a quarry, with high-tech guest experiences and rooms with windows looking into aquariums.

programme.title: E5 - Stratford
programme.desc: Piers and Emma build the first new listed castle in the UK for 100 years, complete with a tower, moat and futuristic tech. It's the biggest ever Grand Design, so is even their £2m budget enough?

programme.title: E1 - Shanghai Wonderland
programme.desc: Rob Rinder and Monica Galetti work behind the scenes of a hotel that is built downwards into a quarry, with high-tech guest experiences and rooms with windows looking into aquariums.

programme.desc: Piers and Emma build the first new listed castle in the UK for 100 years, complete with a tower, moat and futuristic tech. It's the biggest ever Grand Design, so is even their £2m budget enough?

programme.title: E4 - Invisible Hideaways
programme.desc: In Uruguay we venture deep within the rural countryside to an area of remote forests and lakes to a one hundred hectare resort of mirrored cabins. In Sweden we visit the Kolarbyn Eco Lodge - a rustic retreat of 12 hobbit like huts that are replicas of those built in this forest by people making charcoal from as far back as the 1800s.

programme.title: Help, We've Been Hacked!
programme.desc: Ransomware poses an existential threat to businesses. It's a form of cybercrime that's a highly professional industry. The criminals operate like a business - but infiltrating systems, encrypting data, and extorting money.

programme.title: Build Resilience: Climate-Conscious Cities, Homes And Coasts
programme.desc: Ancient sand dunes protect Tamil Nadu, urban planners design cities to be a shield against extreme weather. Plus: Building cyclone-resilient, sustainable homes.

programme.title: Polio Remians A Risk In Madagascar

programme.title: Saving Biodiversity: Can Innovation Stop Extinction?
programme.desc: Nearly a third of all species face extinction. From biodiversity credits to AI tools like BirdNET to efforts stop the spread of the dangerous Asian tiger mosquito, new solutions aim to protect biodiversity, ecosystems and human health.

programme.title: Mental Health: Ill Or Just Wired Differently?
programme.desc: Is a lack of concentration a sign of ADHD? Is a spell of feeling down actually depression? In Good Shape looks at mental health and neurodiversity.

programme.title: Help, We've Been Hacked!

programme.title: The Future Of Farming
programme.desc: From agri-influencers to AI in cowsheds and autonomous tractors: Modern technologies are transforming agriculture worldwide. Machines are increasingly handling physically demanding tasks, both in barns and in fields.

programme.title: What Happens When A Town Creates Its Own Currency?
programme.desc: If you join carsharing or buy solar panels, you get paid money in a currency of its own in the small town Traunstein at Lake Chiemsee in Germany. The trick: you can only spend the 'Chiemgauer” in stores and pubs in the region, which again should cut Co2 emissions. Does it work?

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: A young reporter named Yoneko (Furukawa Kotone) visits Rosanjin (Fuji Tatsuya) in his later years, a towering figure in Japanese culinary and artistic aesthetics. Though bewildered by his imperious and self-centered behavior, she continues to call on him to take dictation for his memoir. As she witnesses his interactions with distinguished figures-including Yoshida Shigeru, Noguchi Isamu, and John D. Rockefeller III-Yoneko slowly begins to understand the real Rosanjin: a man who, for all his sharp words, regards cuisine as a form of art and pursues it with unwavering, uncompromising dedication.

programme.title: E5 - Masters Of Disguise
programme.desc: Episode 5 reveals nature's stealthiest and most deceptive creatures. From near silent flight and color-changing camouflage to deceptive scents and mimicry.

programme.title: E2 - A Brave Little Dog
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff treats a dog with a mysterious injury. Dr. Petra helps vet tech Jes' Dalmatian after it eats something toxic.

programme.title: E1 - Married To The Mob
programme.desc: When wildfires destroy the sanctuary scattering the kangaroos, Rae does everything possible to save them while reconnecting with a traumatised Kanku.

programme.title: E5 - Working At The Cow Wash
programme.desc: As summer arrives, the team hosts a carwash fundraiser to help the cows and donkeys receive medication.

programme.title: E13 - Heat Heroes
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll look at the incredible ways creatures endure extreme heat.

E39
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E40
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills season 15 kicks off on Monday,Housewives Erika Jayne, Dorit Kemsley, Kyle Richards, Bozoma Saint John, and Sutton Stracke return for a season marked by fresh starts, major fallouts and unforgettable adventures. New housewife and fashion mogul Rachel Zoe makes a dazzling return to Bravo after more than a decade. Single and stepping back into the spotlight on her own terms, she's ready to unveil RZ 2.0 to the world. Also joining the group is housewife Amanda Frances, a self-made businesswoman who lives in her friend Kyle Richards' former family home. She's determined to build her future in the land of fame and fortune.

programme.title: E24 - Cranberries
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the bouncing and singing Cranberries!

programme.title: E77 - Sleepybyes
programme.desc: The Teletubbies say goodnight to the Tiddlytubbies; it is sleepybyes time. But Po isn't tired anymore and goes for a special ride on her scooter.

programme.title: E1 - Tummy Flutters
programme.desc: It's the OKIDO circus today, and Messy is worried about performing his triple flip. Will his friends be able to help him conquer his tummy flutters before the audience arrives?

programme.title: E2 - The Face Painting Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are looking for Duggee but can't find him. Instead, they find someone who looks like Enid, only much too big. Duggee has painted his face to look like Enid!

programme.title: E1 - Bedroom
programme.desc: Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings, but get absorbed by trading items and swapping notes at bedtime. Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.

programme.title: E2 - Cup
programme.desc: Bella plays with her favourite cup - it makes the perfect drum for a sing along with Lift. Together, they visit Kingsley and Queenie who play the 'Tea Party Dash', but who will win?

programme.title: E9 - The Tadpole Badge
programme.desc: Duggee has made a beautiful rock pool. The Squirrels spot the strangest things - dots with tails, wriggling around. What on earth are they? They are baby frogs - tadpoles!

programme.title: E7 - The Treehouse Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is cleaning the clubhouse so the squirrels take refuge in the treehouse, but it's getting a little bit cramped these days. Norrie has an idea - maybe they need to add an extension.

programme.title: E19 - Panama Canal, Panama
programme.desc: Glitch sinks in the Panama Canal and needs saving... again.

programme.desc: When Sarah hears some interesting music on the radio, she and Duck try to recreate it.

programme.desc: Stanley helps Little Woo and Seamus fly their new kite. It gets stuck up a tree and breaks. Using leaves and sticks, they build a better one, only for that to get stuck.

programme.desc: Stanley and Morris put too many boxes on the barge and now one end is sinking and the other is lifting up. Stanley get's the townsfolk to help level it out.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: Lavender Fields
programme.desc: Jasmin Flores lives a peaceful life in her mountain hometown until she falls for Arthur Pelaez, a man hiding dark secrets. Arthur is tied to a powerful gun cartel and trapped in a marriage to Iris Buenavidez. When Arthur becomes a target over stolen money, Jasmin loses everything and reinvents herself as Lavender Fields, seeking revenge against those who destroyed her life. The series blends romance, betrayal, and vengeance in a high-stakes world of crime and family power struggles.

programme.desc: Private Military Contractors (PMCs) engage in high-stakes tasks daily, with many skilled Filipino soldiers involved. Incognito follows ex-soldiers on covert missions, blending intense action with themes of honor, love, and redemption.

programme.title: Building Fortified Castles
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, castles are built to protect their residents from danger. Lord Roach wants to have his castle fitted with every single type of defense system. Howle r- his architect, loves the idea. But there is something that may ruin the construction process.

programme.title: Time After Time
programme.desc: When Darwin gets lost in his work, Newts comes up with a plan to help him keep track of time.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... Running Shoes
programme.desc: Henry Meets a pair of running shoes, and he becomes an athlete to help Running Shoes achieve her dream of competing in a race!

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... a Caterpillar
programme.desc: Henry meets a Caterpillar and helps him reunite with his family, who later all turn into butterflies!

programme.title: Butterfly City
programme.desc: Team Doki is eager to meet their friend Emma's pet monarch butterfly. But the team has barely landed in Emma's town in Michigan, USA, when Augustine flutters away. But where do monarchs go for the winter?

programme.title: Gym Day
programme.desc: Today at the pet gym Cassie, the lazy Labrador, goes swimming, and will Fudge, the fat cat, ever get up? Down in the wild woods, the Junior Vets meet even bigger cats – the Eurasian lynx, Europe's third-largest predator!

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: Time After Time
programme.desc: When Darwin gets lost in his work, Newts comes up with a plan to help him keep track of time.

programme.title: Ribbon
programme.desc: What can Hepi and Briko make with a ribbon? Let's find out!

programme.title: Hygiene in The Middle Ages
programme.desc: Howler isn't exactly a paragon of cleanliness! But seeing as he's got a soft spot for Dove, he needs to step up the hygiene if he wants to win her heart! So he introduces us to various medieval hygiene techniques.

programme.title: The Feast of Fools
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, life may be tough, but having fun is also on the agenda! Folly Festival is a carnival where everyone sings and dances, but also has fun trading places. Howler becomes a princess for the day, and Little Lewis a lord.

programme.title: Race to the Top
programme.desc: Sprinter and Riwahl sign up for an expedition to climb Mount Bhilka. They have to race to the top. Riwahl cheats his way up to the first place but it's a trap set up by Cleopatra. Sprinter has to save him, but does it feel right, when Riwahl has been cheating?

programme.title: Submarine
programme.desc: Kit and Mr. Battery dive into the deep ocean to retrieve Mr. Battery's lost camera..

programme.title: Somewhere Over the Rainbow
programme.desc: Chameleon loves his bright white skin, but a muddy puddle changes everything! As he tries to clean himself, he ends up more colorful than ever. When he's finally clean again, Chameleon realizes he misses the colors-so how will he get them back?

programme.title: Ebb and the Greedy Gulls
programme.desc: Ebb and Bird lose their breakfast to a greedy gull. Unaware, Flo takes them for a beach picnic and Ebb has to guard the sandwiches from the gulls. Ebb gets the blame for eating the sandwiches until Flo discovers the truth and is sorry for doubting Ebb.

programme.title: Tension and Chemical Kinetics
programme.desc: What exactly is surface tension? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of materials science. Have hands-on fun by experimenting with liquid detergent, and get to know Yuan T. Lee, a chemist, known for his advances in kinetics of chemical reactions.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 講述兩名截然不同的人 ─ 缺乏同情心的騙子與同情心氾濫的律師因與邪惡抗爭，組成了一支看起來不太可能實現的聯盟後所發生的故事。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。

Unmatchable Match
programme.desc: Undercover cop Cheung Long is instructed to take up the identity as convict to get acquainted to Lee Wan Fay who is a stolen goods dealer. In the course of escaping from Big Mad, an opponent of Fay, both Long and Fay grow a good feeling towards each other. When Long's supervisor wants to use Fay to bait Big Mad, Long saves Fay and tells him the truth...

programme.title: The Adventurers
programme.desc: 20 years ago, in the region of Golden Triangle, Wah(aged about 9) and his parents, his god father (Keung) with his daughter (aged about 5) planned to smuggle some valuable items and information into Thailand. Wah's father, Keung and Leung were the closest of friends, just like blood brothers, all 3 of them were C.I.A. agents. Keung left for Thailand before the others to plan the operation. Leung ganged up with some bandits and forced Wah's father to surrender the confidential information. Wah, hidden in the dark, saw his parents being killed. 20 years later, Wah became an officer in the Thai Air Force. He couldn't take his mind off the revenge. Leung became a successful business man. He was in Thailand to launch a major business project. Ignoring Keung's advise, Wah and Roy slipped into Leung's hotel to try to assassinate him...

programme.title: Blind Detective
programme.desc: The crime-solver in the Police Crime Unit CHONG was forced to quit four years ago after he got blind accidentally and since then has worked as a private eye on cold cases to earn rewards for a living. He has spent nine months investigating the suspect for the Mongkok Acid Attack Case but was caught in a dire situation during an operation. Fortunately he was saved by a woman detective TUNG in the nick of time...

programme.title: Triumph in the Skies
programme.desc: Young pilot Branson recently takes over Skylette, his father's aviation empire, only to realize his old flames Cassie is a flight attendant there. Several years ago, he was forced to break up with her and move to New York to take care of his father's business. To this day, the two continue to harbor feelings for each other but decide to keep them bottled up. In an effort to rebrand the airline, Branson invites rock idol TM to star in an upcoming commercial and appoints Sam as her flying consultant. Incongruent in both tastes and experience, this odd couple gets off on the wrong foot. As the shoot progresses, however, they slowly discover each other's merits, developing a strong mutual attraction. Jayden has left Skylette Airline to become a pilot for private jets. He meets the young and vivacious Kika during a flight and assumes her to be wayward and shallow. But they turn out to have a lot in common and start falling madly in love. At the height of their romance, Jayden real

programme.title: DAY OFF
programme.desc: For forty years A-Rui has been running a barbershop, a small place where she has seen happiness and sorrow, ebb and flow. Faced with all the troubles in her life, A-Rui fully commits to her work and defeat is never an option for her, but her children never appreciate it and treat her profession with disdain. One day, A-Rui receives a phone call from the family of an old regular client who moved far away a long time ago. The family asks A-Rui if she would be willing to travel to cut the hair for the bedridden old man. Reminded of what her master taught her, “Always provide your best service,” A-Rui decides to hang up the “Day Off” sign and closes her shop for one day. She drives her beat-up old car and embarks on a long journey to do something others think is not worthwhile.

E7
programme.desc: 延續上一季，現代人王衡與西漢海昏侯劉賀再度聯手，他們的足跡從長安延伸至豫章，並深入民間；探討他們如何運用現代思維應對宮廷權謀與民間疾苦，在面對地方積弊和幕後黑手的過程中相互砥礪，並努力改寫歷史。

programme.title: E1 - 旅行初見破冰局
programme.desc: 由劉宇寧、龔俊、孫紅雷、李乃文、陳赫、陳星旭、王玉雯、歐陽娣娣組成爆笑「地球團」，沿著地球脈絡從中國出發，感受北緯40度的煙火氣，通過遊戲任務解鎖各地文化與美食，用新鮮有趣的方式，探索全世界的同頻快樂。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 延續上一季，現代人王衡與西漢海昏侯劉賀再度聯手，他們的足跡從長安延伸至豫章，並深入民間；探討他們如何運用現代思維應對宮廷權謀與民間疾苦，在面對地方積弊和幕後黑手的過程中相互砥礪，並努力改寫歷史。

programme.title: E50
programme.desc: 兼顧情緒價值輸出，為女性量身打造兼具時尚審美與人文關懷的變裝微綜藝，全方位多角度地向社會傳遞積極的生活態度；種草生活好物、推薦文旅線路、科普健康知識。

programme.title: E50

programme.title: E5 - Extreme Conditions
programme.desc: Conservationists capture and study Whitetail Deer in the frigid South Dakotan winter.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Six Australians embark on one of the most thrilling and dangerous training courses Australia has to offer – saltwater crocodile wrangling - and are immediately thrown in at the deep end when an emergency at the farm means they have to help separate two giant males who are up for a blue.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Renee is on the lookout for a missing croc. The men mess up their top-jaw roping practice and they have a runaway croc on their hands. Lyn tells John her tragic secret.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: With the help of a local Oklahoma guide, Jess sets out to hunt an axis deer, then shares butchery techniques and prepares a delicious backstrap grilled over live fire.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: Jess heads to Wyatt Ranches in South Texas to check out the cattle ranching operation they've been running since 1965.

programme.title: E5 - Big Stone Fever
programme.desc: The mining operation seems to be gaining momentum with regular finds of small carat diamonds, but the big diamonds are eluding them.

programme.title: E3 - Bad News
programme.desc: With the gas still not connected in the kitchen, Sarah is unable to train her staff or test the new menu. As the restaurant launch fast approaches there’s more bad news that could put Sarah’s big plans in jeopardy.

programme.desc: Jess heads to Wyatt Ranches in South Texas to check out the cattle ranching operation they've been running since 1965.

programme.desc: The mining operation seems to be gaining momentum with regular finds of small carat diamonds, but the big diamonds are eluding them.

programme.title: E7 - Danielle Redlick
programme.desc: Stay-at-home mom Danielle Redlick was arrested and charged with 2nd Degree Murder and Tampering with Physical Evidence in the death of her husband, pro sports executive Michael Redlick.

programme.title: E1 - Murder On The Family Farm
programme.desc: A Kentucky community is rocked to its core when a prominent family is gunned down in their home after Sunday church service. The sole survivor of the attack claims he killed an intruder in self-defence.

programme.title: E7 - The Cost Of Happiness
programme.desc: One FBI undercover agent meets with suspects in Denmark in an effort to retrieve one of the world's lost treasures; another agent takes on an unlikely suspect believed to be planning a murder for hire.

programme.title: E3 - Birthdays, Booze, And Bail Oh My!
programme.desc: First-timers and frequent flyers get booked, including the son of a deputy who is charged with stealing a dog, and an intoxicated gentleman comes back to see his favourite policeman.

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.

programme.title: House Of Lies
programme.desc: House of Lies is an intense, family-centered drama about two mothers who face off against each other. Shaped by painful pasts, they clash in a fierce battle marked by betrayal, hidden family secrets, and a fight for survival.

programme.title: E6 - JJ's Favorite Games & Vehicles!
programme.desc: It's time to play JJ's favorite games! Join Ms. Appleberry & the Melon Patch kids as they play 'follow the leader' & have a contest to see who can make the silliest funny face. Then, JJ & his animal friends have a party where they play freeze dance! The fun continues with vehicles, as Grandpa makes a cool choo-choo train out of cardboard boxes & the kids play with different construction vehicles in a giant sandpit.

programme.title: E2 - The Most Unpredictable Magic Mishaps!
programme.desc: Get ready for the most unpredictable magic mishaps! First, Magic Pet Chroma accidentally takes away all the colors from the city, & Morphle must morph into a magic paintbrush to paint them all back. Then, Professor Paula's new youth serum is accidentally spilled on Mila, turning her into a baby! Now Morphle has to look after baby Mila while an antidote is created. The mishaps continue as giant bubbles carry away citizens & a giant living doll causes chaos!

programme.title: E2 - How Does It Work?!
programme.desc: Blippi is wondering, 'How does it work?!' Join Blippi & his robot buddy FETCH on an adventure to find the answers! Blippi shrinks down to fly inside a beehive & learn how honey is made, & explores a garbage truck to find out why flies love it so much. Then, it’s a trip through a factory to see how chocolate is made! The adventure even travels through time as Blippi meets his great-grandpa to see the very first cars. Plus, Blippi & FETCH help a nervous crane learn to build a skyscraper!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E6 - JJ's Favorite Games & Vehicles!
programme.desc: It's time to play JJ's favorite games! Join Ms. Appleberry & the Melon Patch kids as they play 'follow the leader' & have a contest to see who can make the silliest funny face. Then, JJ & his animal friends have a party where they play freeze dance! The fun continues with vehicles, as Grandpa makes a cool choo-choo train out of cardboard boxes & the kids play with different construction vehicles in a giant sandpit.

programme.title: E2 - How Does It Work?!
programme.desc: Blippi is wondering, 'How does it work?!' Join Blippi & his robot buddy FETCH on an adventure to find the answers! programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. programme.title: The National Dog Show
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world’s largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. “The Dean” David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown. But which dog will have their day, and which will leave with their tail between their legs? After all, there can only be one “Best in Show”.

programme.title: E1 - The Digital Afterlife (Eng Subs)
programme.desc: Can AI cure grief? Inside the new techs using avatars to digitally resurrect the dead. FOR YOUTUBE: Across Japan, Taiwan and South Korea, families are using AI avatars, holograms and VR to say goodbye - or even keep the conversation going. Is this technology healing grief or prolonging it?

programme.title: Asia Now 2026/2027 - 11 Am
programme.desc: (Live) Non-stop breaking stories, expert analysis and extensive news coverage every hour.

programme.title: The Earthquake Detectives
programme.desc: Earthquakes kill thousands of people each year. Now, scientists are searching for clues to when the next big one will strike and a team in China believes they are agonisingly close to a breakthrough.
